name: HR AI Agent
description: An intelligent HR hiring platform agent that handles the full recruitment lifecycle — from generating job descriptions and screening resumes, to drafting interview questions, creating offer letters, building company handbooks, and answering HR policy queries.

skills.name: generate_job_description
skills.description: Generate compelling, professional Job Descriptions in various styles (Corporate, Startup, Technical, Creative, Executive)

skills.name: screen_resume
skills.description: Evaluate and score a candidate's resume against a job description with structured assessment

skills.name: generate_interview_questions
skills.description: Generate 10 tailored interview questions with rationales and expected answers

skills.name: generate_offer_letter
skills.description: Create FAANG-grade professional offer letters with compensation details

skills.name: generate_company_handbook
skills.description: Draft comprehensive company handbooks covering values, culture, and benefits

skills.name: answer_hr_query
skills.description: Answer employee HR policy questions about PTO, benefits, remote work, etc.

skills.name: draft_interview_email
skills.description: Draft professional interview invitation emails for candidates
